# Causal Mediation Analysis

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Traditional mediation analysis

_To be added._

## Defining causal mediation effects

_To be added._

## Statistical assumptions

_To be added._

## Estimating mediation effects

_To be added._

## Reporting recommendations

_To be added._

## Limitations

_To be added._
